plan_deviations: ADJ-001: initial fix used element.exports?.map(ex => ex.name) — not populated at scan time; corrected to elements.filter(e => e.exported).map(e => e.name)
evidence: 4/4 header-exports-cross-check tests pass including new false-stale regression

communication_log.note: Dog-food pass ran. Previously-false-stale files (with export enum) now show defined. 18 genuinely stale files remain stale — correct. Pre-existing stale files in types.ts etc are due to re-export syntax not tracked by element extractor, a separate category. Fix does not mask genuine staleness.

communication_log.phase_name: Apply fix and add regression test
communication_log.note: ADJ-001: initial fix used element.exports?.map(ex => ex.name) which is not populated at scan time; corrected to elements.filter(e => e.exported).map(e => e.name). Build clean, 4/4 cross-check tests pass, 1540/1541 tests pass (1 pre-existing flaky timeout in scanner-export.test.ts unrelated to fix).

communication_log.phase_name: Understand and reproduce the false-stale case
communication_log.note: Divergence confirmed: orchestrator.ts:475 uses rawExports (separate tree-sitter pass); header-generator.ts:118 uses element.exports (element extractor). False-stale occurs when rawExports emits symbols (e.g. export enum, export type) not tracked by element extractor.
